business_question: Which products generate the highest sales but also experience high return rates?
business_context: Merchandising teams need to identify products that drive revenue but may have quality or customer satisfaction issues.
sql_answer:
SELECT
p.PRODUCT_NAME,
SUM(s.UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_SOLD,
SUM(r.UNITS_RETURNED) AS TOTAL_RETURNED,
ROUND(
SUM(r.UNITS_RETURNED) * 100.0 /
NULLIF(SUM(s.UNITS_SOLD),0),
2
) AS RETURN_RATE_PCT
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN FACT_RETURNS r
ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = r.PRODUCT_KEY
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY p.PRODUCT_NAME
ORDER BY TOTAL_SOLD DESC;
